2604.05540.title: Learning to Edit Knowledge via Instruction-based Chain-of-Thought Prompting
2604.05540.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) can effectively handle outdated information through knowledge editing. However, current approaches face two key limitations: (I) Poor generalization: Most approaches rigidly inject new knowledge without ensuring that the model can use it effectively to solve practical problems. (II) Narrow scope: Current methods focus primarily on structured fact triples, overlooking the diverse unstructured forms of factual information (e.g., news, articles) prevalent in real-world contexts. To address these challenges, we propose a new paradigm: teaching LLMs to edit knowledge via Chain of Thoughts (CoTs) reasoning (CoT2Edit). We first leverage language model agents for both structured and unstructured edited data to generate CoTs, building high-quality instruction data. The model is then trained to reason over edited knowledge through supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO). At inference time, we integrate Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to dynamically retrieve relevant edited facts for real-time knowledge editing. Experimental results demonstrate that our method achieves strong generalization across six diverse knowledge editing scenarios with just a single round of training on three open-source language models. The codes are available at https://github.com/FredJDean/CoT2Edit.
2604.05540.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）可以有效地通過知識編輯處理過時的信息。<lb/>然而，目前的方法面臨兩個主要限制：（I）差的泛化能力：大多數方法僵硬地注入新知識，而未確保模型能有效地使用這些知識來解決實際問題。<lb/>（II）範圍狹窄：當前的方法主要集中在結構化的事實三元組上，忽視了在現實世界中普遍存在的多樣化非結構化事實信息形式（例如，新聞、文章）。<lb/>為了解決這些挑戰，我們提出了一種新範式：通過思維鏈（CoTs）推理來教導LLMs編輯知識（CoT2Edit）。<lb/>我們首先利用語言模型代理生成結構化和非結構化的編輯數據，以生成思維鏈，構建高質量的指令數據。<lb/>然後，模型通過監督微調（SFT）和群體相對政策優化（GRPO）來訓練對編輯知識進行推理。<lb/>在推理時，我們整合檢索增強生成（RAG），以動態檢索相關的編輯事實進行實時知識編輯。<lb/>實驗結果表明，我們的方法在六個不同的知識編輯場景中實現了強大的泛化能力，僅需在三個開源語言模型上進行一次訓練。<lb/>代碼可在 https://github.com/FredJDean/CoT2Edit 獲得。
2604.05540.author: Jinhu Fu et.al.
2604.05540.authors: Jinhu Fu, Yan Bai, Longzhu He, Yihang Lou, Yanxiao Zhao, Li Sun, Sen Su
